creator: drtr0jan@yandex.ru
text:
Created attachment 258005
victoria-metrics-1.110.2.patch

(In reply to Alexey Dokuchaev from comment #37)

> Today I've commented out .include "${.CURDIR}/../victoria-metrics/Makefile.deps"
> and surprisingly, the port built fine.  I've compared several random
> components' contents under `vendor' subdirectory and discovered they're
> mostly identical, except for missing docs, test, and go.mod files.
> So, if VM's main distfile already bundles needles dependencies, do we actually
> need GH_TUPLE or GO_MODULE?

Yep, you right. Github dist is already vendored. We don't need GH_TUPLE or GO_MODULE anymore.

I've attached the patch for updating to the latest LTS 1.110.2. Also sanited port (check portfmt/portclippy). Separated vmutils files dir for future rc-scripts (vmalert, etc).
